phases.name: Kernel Registry
phases.goal: Create the source of truth for repos, modules, templates, integrations, and roadmap.

phases.name: AI Warehouse Integration
phases.goal: Connect project memory, repo summaries, decisions, and retrieval contracts.

phases.name: QA OS Integration
phases.goal: Make QA OS the quality gate for every generated or maintained project.

phases.name: Template Engine
phases.goal: Generate project scaffolds by app type and module selection.

phases.name: Infra Engine
phases.goal: Add production infrastructure patterns across Docker, CI/CD, cloud, secrets, environments, and deploys.

phases.name: MCP Server
phases.goal: Expose kernel capabilities as MCP tools and resources.

phases.name: Orchestration and Jobs
phases.goal: Run durable jobs, scans, retries, approvals, and scheduled audits.

phases.name: Command Center Dashboard
phases.goal: Visualize projects, templates, jobs, QA runs, deployments, infra, security, and docs.
